paragraphs.text: And finally, I have given her Decree 3 to encourage those who are 100% yielded to me. Because of their life of total obedience with a circumcised heart submitting to my will for their life, they will have a blessed life. I will bless them with a life of peace and prosperity, and I will bring them to my Holy Mountain in a much shorter time with no struggles and exalt them to be my anointed ones. They will only take 10% of the time to reach their destiny.

Job 8:5 If thou wouldest seek unto THE EL betimes, and make thy supplication to THE SHADDAI; Job 8:6 If thou wert pure and upright; surely now he would awake for thee, and make the habitation of thy righteousness prosperous. Job 8:7 Though thy beginning was small, yet thy latter end should greatly increase.

I have given full power and authority to SHEKINAIH to discipline my children in any way, and she has 100% liberty to discipline my children in any way as she deems fit. I have entrusted this full, 100% authority to her. Therefore, my children, be wise to submit to her as unto me, for all your rewards, giftings, breakthroughs, promotions, etc. have I entrusted to her with full authority and power to represent me. To despise her is to seek death. However, if you yield to her as unto me, you will find breakthroughs (for she is holding in her hand all your breakthroughs) and life everlasting. Her plea for you is vital to your survival. This is the protocol written by me in Heaven. Do not despise my repeated warning, for it will save your soul from Gehenna fire where you will be tormented eternally if you do not repent and yield to me in her.

"The hand of SHEKINAIH within the hand of THE FATHER symbolizes divine control. Through SHEKINAIH, the test papers of ADONAI are released, squeezing the faithful in all aspects of their lives to refine and prove their worthiness."
